name: GraphQL composable example
description: Worked example of a composable GraphQL schema: a Schema plugin plus a SchemaExtension and DataProducers that add an article query and a createArticle mutation.
ecosystem_note: Example/reference submodule of GraphQL (ships under the project's examples/ directory). It is the canonical worked example of the composable pattern: a Schema plugin `ComposableSchemaExample` (id `composable_example`, extends the core ComposableSchema), a SchemaExtension `ComposableSchemaExampleExtension` (id `composable_extension`, targets schema `composable_example`) that pairs SDL (composable_extension.base/extension.graphqls) with resolvers, and three DataProducers (`create_article`, `article_response_article`, `response_violations`). Enable it to get a working end-to-end endpoint: create a graphql_server with schema `composable_example`, enable the `composable_extension` in schema_configuration, and you have a live `article(id)` query and `createArticle(data)` mutation. Depends on node. Meant to be read/copied, not run in production as-is.
